user.title: iPixel Color LED Matrix
user.description: {device_count} iPixel device(s) found via Bluetooth scan. Select one from the list or enter an address manually.

bluetooth_confirm.title: iPixel Color detected
bluetooth_confirm.description: Found **{name}** at `{address}`. Confirm to add this device.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the device. Make sure it is powered on and in range.
error.no_devices_found: No iPixel devices found. Enter the Bluetooth address manually.

send_text.name: Send Text
send_text.description: Display a text message on the LED matrix.

save_slot.name: Save Slot
save_slot.description: Slot index to save the content (0-9).

send_image.name: Send Image
send_image.description: Display an image or GIF on the LED matrix.

path.name: File Path
path.description: Absolute path to the image or GIF file on the HA host.

save_slot.name: Save Slot
save_slot.description: Slot index to save the content (0-9).

set_clock.name: Set Clock Mode
set_clock.description: Switch the device to clock display mode.

set_pixel.name: Set Pixel
set_pixel.description: Set the color of a specific pixel.
